ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to (e.g., Europe, Americas) */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy in the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the index */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the index */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the index */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the factor (e.g., GDP, family, health) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the factor */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the factor in the index calculation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data for the factor */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the score was recorded */,
  "score" REAL /* Score value */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the score */,
  "methodology_version" TEXT /* Methodology version used */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the score */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factor_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the factor */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the value was recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the factor */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the factor value */,
  "methodology_version" TEXT /* Methodology version used */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the factor value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the factor value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_values_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_values_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES factors ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the report belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
